text:
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Weekly Audit Health Report workflow failed.
- [escalation] Andy: Newsletter from Andrew Lang about making care visible and social impact.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch shared a book review and proposed discussing it Thursday evening.
- [reply needed] Don Cooper: Don Cooper asking to schedule next meeting and discussing hardware resources.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley sending Zoom meeting link for Saturday at 10am.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley confirming a Zoom meeting scheduled for Saturday at 10am Pacific Daylight Time.
- [follow up] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch connecting Mike and Scott to coordinate cover design timeline and graphics.
- [no action] lang.mc+cc@gmail.com: Daily brief email with task reminders including sending deliverables to David Purdy.
- [no action] "Superhuman – Zain Kahn": Newsletter from Superhuman about Meta's brain-scanning model and SEO auditing.
- [no action] "info@schooljobs.com": Automated job interest notification from Seattle Public Schools.
- [no action] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary noting a failed GitHub workflow run.
- [no action] lang.mc+cc@gmail.com: Daily brief reminder to renew 2017 Subaru Outback vehicle registration.
